query: what is the capital of australia
answer: The capital of Australia is Canberra. It was chosen in 1908 to avoid rivalry between Sydney and Melbourne. Canberra is located in the Australian Capital Territory.

Faced with widespread chaos, a radical decision was made to cut to the chase: they **would build a new city from the ground up!** Australia’s first capital city built from the ground up. ## Canberra, Australia’s small capital city. results.title: Where is Canberra | Canberra
results.snippet: # Where is Canberra. # Where is Canberra. Canberra is Australia’s capital city. You’ll find us in south east Australia, in the Australian Capital Territory (ACT). Australia’s two most populated cities are nearby – Sydney to the north and Melbourne to the south. In 1901, this region was chosen as the setting for Australia’s new capital city. Australia was – and is – a young nation, and wanted a new, modern city as its capital. Canberra and it’s surrounding regions combined make a population of nearer to 950,000. As connected with the world as we are detached from the bustle and rushing you’ll find in Australia’s bigger cities. But over time, and as Canberra has emerged, the work here has changed. ## Life in Canberra. No matter where you live in Canberra, it’s easy to find your way to nature. You can also fly in from Australia’s other capital cities and regional centres or book a seat on a coach or rail service from Sydney or Melbourne.

results.title: Australian Capital Territory (Canberra) - Study Australia
results.snippet: Skip to content or footer. # Australian Capital Territory (Canberra). Australia's capital is a young, vibrant city with a reputation for inclusivity, innovation, and excellence in education. ## About the Australian Capital Territory (ACT). The Australian Capital Territory is home to one of the nation’s most significant cities - Canberra. Its location offers a unique Australian experience, and provides easy access to national parks, Australia's biggest snowfields in winter and the pristine beaches of the New South Wales south coast in summer. Over 25% of the ACT's residents were born overseas, including 15,000 international students from over 100 countries. Over 60% of the ACT is open space and nature reserves. The ACT is home to some of the country’s best ranked institutions, with several in Australia’s top 10 and the world’s top 100. ## About Canberra. ## A snapshot of Canberra. Use our Cost of Living calculator to find out how much you will need to live and study here. ## Footer content.
